_meta.description: Curated subset of ~12 NCCI-style edits for the POC. Modeled on the CMS National Correct Coding Initiative structure; not the full ~3M-row production table.

code_vocabulary.99213: Office visit, established patient, low complexity
code_vocabulary.99214: Office visit, established patient, moderate complexity
code_vocabulary.99215: Office visit, established patient, high complexity
code_vocabulary.58262: Vaginal hysterectomy with removal of tube(s)/ovary(ies)
code_vocabulary.58720: Salpingo-oophorectomy (removal of fallopian tubes and ovaries)

diagnosis_vocabulary.Z34.90: Supervision of normal pregnancy, unspecified trimester

ptp_edits.description: Vaginal hysterectomy with tube/ovary removal (58262) is comprehensive; vaginal hysterectomy alone (58260) is a component — cannot be billed separately
Vaginal hysterectomy with tube/ovary removal (58262) includes salpingo-oophorectomy (58720) — cannot unbundle
Comprehensive metabolic panel (80053) includes all components of basic metabolic panel (80048)
Complete ECG (93000) includes tracing (93005); may unbundle with documented modifier

mue_edits.rationale: One E/M office visit per beneficiary per day
One E/M office visit per beneficiary per day
One E/M office visit per beneficiary per day
One comprehensive metabolic panel per encounter
Venipuncture; up to 3 sites plausible per encounter

mutually_exclusive_edits.description: Fetal non-stress test — female patients only

upcoding_rules.description: High-complexity E/M visit (99215) not supported by a low-acuity diagnosis; 99213 is the appropriate level
